name_cn:
Normal shipping during Spring Festival
 NEVERFULL BB Handbag #️⃣M46705
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to boutique production processes with dynamic chip code changing. Original factory exclusive fabric, original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic).
Please compare with the authentic French version if needed!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive authentic factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website latest full gift box!

(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Hardware
Zipper closure
Interior slip pocket
D-ring with removable coin purse
